# [Clang] assertion failure when parsing invalid declaration with explicit(...) and enum

**Author:** YuchangSu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/183887
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-03-10T19:26:32Z

## Body

Code:
```c++
enum a explicit(a()
```

See Compiler Explorer: [https://godbolt.org/z/741bcxcMW](https://godbolt.org/z/741bcxcMW)

Regression since Clang 12.0.0

Backtrace:

### Comment 3 - shafik

If you are going to be fuzzing the clang-frontend please try and restrict them to regression that go no further back than the last give releases. 

---
